---
title: ""
---

```{=html}
<div style="background: linear-gradient(135deg, #2d6a4f 0%, #52b788 60%, #74c69d 100%); border-radius: 10px; padding: 2.5rem 2.5rem 2rem; position: relative; overflow: hidden; color: white; margin-bottom: 2rem;">
  <div style="position:absolute; right:2rem; top:50%; transform:translateY(-50%); opacity:0.12; display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:12px; font-size:52px; color:white;">
    🌿 🐟 🌊
  </div>
  <div style="display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:6px; background:rgba(255,255,255,0.15); border:0.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25); border-radius:20px; font-size:12px; padding:4px 12px; margin-bottom:14px;">
    🌱 Quantitative Ecologist & Applied Statistician
  </div>
  <p style="font-size:22px; font-weight:500; margin:0 0 6px;">Baptiste Alglave</p>
  <p style="font-size:14px; color:rgba(255,255,255,0.75); margin:0 0 18px;">Associate Professor · Université Bretagne Sud · Lab-STICC (UMR 6285)</p>
  <div style="display:flex; gap:8px; flex-wrap:wrap;">
    <span style="background:rgba(255,255,255,0.12); border:0.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.2); border-radius:20px; font-size:12px; padding:4px 12px; color:rgba(255,255,255,0.85);">📍 Species distribution</span>
    <span style="background:rgba(255,255,255,0.12); border:0.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.2); border-radius:20px; font-size:12px; padding:4px 12px; color:rgba(255,255,255,0.85);">📊 Spatio-temporal statistics</span>
    <span style="background:rgba(255,255,255,0.12); border:0.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.2); border-radius:20px; font-size:12px; padding:4px 12px; color:rgba(255,255,255,0.85);">📈 Population dynamics</span>
    <span style="background:rgba(255,255,255,0.12); border:0.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.2); border-radius:20px; font-size:12px; padding:4px 12px; color:rgba(255,255,255,0.85);">🌊 Marine ecosystems</span>
  </div>
</div>
```

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="75%"}

I am a quantitative ecologist and applied statistician, with a specific interest in species distribution, population dynamics and spatio-temporal statistical modeling. I work at University Bretagne Sud as an associate professor of statistics (IUT Vannes, Data Science department) in the GIS group of Lab-STICC (UMR 6285).

You'll find additional details in the following pages!

If you want to contact me, here is:

- **my email:** baptiste.alglave@univ-ubs.fr

- **my current work address:** 8 Rue Michel de Montaigne, 56000 Vannes

:::
::: {.column width="5%"}

:::
::: {.column width="20%"}
<center>
![](ressource/images/baptiste_alglave.jpg)

<a href="ressource/pdf/cv_baptiste_alglave_short.pdf" style="color:#d0d3d4;font-weight:bold;text-decoration:none">Short CV</a>

<a href="ressource/pdf/cv_baptiste_alglave.pdf" style="color:#d0d3d4;font-weight:bold;text-decoration:none">Long CV</a>

</center>
:::
::::
